Patch

Upstream changes:

 - Update version from 5.2 -> 5.4. The new version delivers functional enhancements and bug fixes. For details, please refer the changelog: http://www.sweethome3d.com/history.jsp

Port changes:

 - adjusted patch to make it work with OpenJDK 8
